coachingCues.title: Chest tall, weight close
coachingCues.body: Hold the weight tight to your chest. Stack ribs over hips before the first rep.

coachingCues.title: Hips down, knees track
coachingCues.body: Sit between the knees with control. Let knees follow the toes instead of collapsing in.

coachingCues.title: Stay braced at depth
coachingCues.body: Keep heels grounded and the torso proud at the bottom before driving up.

coachingCues.title: Drive through mid-foot
coachingCues.body: Push the floor away and stand tall without letting the weight drift forward.

coachingCues.title: Lock in a strong plank
coachingCues.body: Hands under shoulders, ribs tucked, glutes lightly squeezed. Keep one long line.

coachingCues.title: Lower as one piece
coachingCues.body: Bend the elbows with control. Chest and hips travel together toward the floor.

coachingCues.title: Pause without sagging
coachingCues.body: Stay braced near the bottom. Avoid shrugging or letting the hips drop.

coachingCues.title: Press the floor away
coachingCues.body: Drive through the hands until elbows extend and the shoulder blades move naturally.

coachingCues.title: Brace, then reach tall
coachingCues.body: Sit tall with ribs stacked. Let the shoulders reach up without losing control.

coachingCues.title: Pull elbows down first
coachingCues.body: Start by driving elbows toward the ribs. Keep the chest lifted and neck relaxed.

coachingCues.title: Squeeze without leaning back
coachingCues.body: Finish with the bar near upper chest. Avoid turning the rep into a backward swing.

coachingCues.title: Control the stretch
coachingCues.body: Let arms lengthen under control so the lats stretch before the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Stand tall, elbows quiet
coachingCues.body: Brace lightly and keep elbows close to the sides before starting the curl.

coachingCues.title: Curl without swinging
coachingCues.body: Lift the dumbbells by bending the elbows. Keep shoulders relaxed and still.

coachingCues.title: Squeeze at the top
coachingCues.body: Pause briefly with the forearms high. Do not let elbows drift forward.

coachingCues.title: Own the way down
coachingCues.body: Lower slowly until arms are long again. Keep tension through the whole rep.

coachingCues.title: Soft knees, long spine
coachingCues.body: Start tall with a small knee bend. Keep the weight close and spine long.

coachingCues.title: Push hips back
coachingCues.body: Hinge from the hips. The weight travels down close to the legs, not away from you.

coachingCues.title: Find hamstring tension
coachingCues.body: Stop when you feel the hamstrings load while the back position stays strong.

coachingCues.title: Drive hips through
coachingCues.body: Stand by bringing hips forward. Finish tall without leaning back.
